items.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo a global health emergency
items.summary: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

items.title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
items.summary: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

items.title: Man drives car into pedestrians in Italy, injuring eight
items.summary: Eight people were injured, four seriously, before passers-by gave chase and stopped the man.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 阿聯核電廠遭無人機攻擊 引發火警無人傷亡
items.summary: 阿拉伯聯合大公國一座核電廠今（17）日遭到無人機攻擊，引發火災，所幸阿聯當局表示，這起事故沒有影響到核電廠安全，也沒有任何人受傷。  《美聯社》報導，阿布達比媒體辦公室（Ab...…

items.title: 川普把中國送的禮物全丟垃圾桶！ 許美華：諜對諜電影真實上演
items.summary: 美國總統川普本月13日至15日出訪北京，並與中國國家主席習近平會晤，雙方在檯面上的互動看上去相當友好，不過此趟訪中行結束後，有白宮記者爆料，川普一行人將中方送的禮物、中國準備的一...…

items.title: 「那個人」是誰？ 白宮記者順著話提「台灣總統」 川普點頭未否認
items.summary: 美國總統川普結束訪中行後在空軍一號受訪時被問到對台軍售一事，脫口稱自己要與「現在正在管理台灣的那個人談談」，被認為是在暗示要與我國總統賴清德直接對話，引發各界高度關切。之後有白宮...…
